settings.warmup: 1+ (graph runs include the one-time torch.compile in warmup)
settings.metric: best wall time after CUDA synchronize for Torch paths; direct vLLM uses synchronous llm.chat wall time
settings.note: All Torch-stack entries remeasured 2026-06-12 with GPU mel feature extraction (gpu-feature-extraction branch). Direct vLLM entries are from the 2026-06-11 run on their own documented stack.

baseline.name: qwen-asr (official, https://github.com/QwenLM/Qwen3-ASR)
baseline.configuration: transformers backend, SDPA, generate()-based decoding, called directly without this wrapper

direct_vllm_baseline.name: direct vLLM Qwen3-ASR path from the official README
direct_vllm_baseline.configuration: vllm.LLM(...).chat(...) with audio_url data URL input, max_model_len=4096, gpu_memory_utilization=0.65, async_scheduling=False, max_tokens=256, best of five after one warmup
direct_vllm_baseline.package_stack_note: The exact qwen-asr[vllm] package stack (qwen-asr 0.0.6, vLLM 0.14.0, transformers 4.57.6) could not be benchmarked on this GB10 CUDA 13 host because the available vLLM 0.14 wheel was linked against CUDA 12 (libcudart.so.12).

direct_vllm_eager.note: vLLM enforce_eager=True; torch.compile and CUDA graphs disabled

faster_qwen_asr_dynamic_decode.note: internal fallback path (--no-cuda-graph), manual greedy decode

faster_qwen_asr_cuda_graph_int8.quantization: int8 weight-only (torchao), text decoder + lm_head only, opt-in

direct_vllm_eager.note: vLLM enforce_eager=True; torch.compile and CUDA graphs disabled

faster_qwen_asr_dynamic_decode.note: internal fallback path (--no-cuda-graph), manual greedy decode

faster_qwen_asr_cuda_graph_int8.quantization: int8 weight-only (torchao), text decoder + lm_head only, opt-in

notes.configuration: faster-qwen-asr CUDA graph decode is the default path: self-feeding captured graph (token feedback, mask and position computation in-graph) with a torch.compile'd (max-autotune-no-cudagraphs) decode step, prefill written directly into the StaticCache.
notes.direct_vllm: Direct vLLM returns raw Qwen ASR text such as 'language English<asr_text>...' when not routed through qwen_asr.parse_asr_output; timings measure generation only, not wrapper parsing.
notes.correctness: bf16 transcripts byte-identical to the pre-optimization implementation on a 4-clip x 2-size x 2-path verification set. int8: 7/8 transcripts identical, one clip changed a single word.
notes.previous_baseline: Pre-optimization (commit 20ee9b1, 11.0s JFK clip): 0.6B dynamic 0.3951s / graph 0.2863s; 1.7B dynamic 1.5435s / graph 0.6296s.
